# CopyEmoji.in - Emoji Encyclopedia for India & Global
> Official llms.txt for AI crawlers & search engines
> Last updated: 2026-03-27

## Site Overview
- **Domain**: https://copyemoji.in
- **Purpose**: Comprehensive emoji meanings, WhatsApp usage, Hindi explanations, Desi context.
- **Languages**: English, Hindi (Hinglish), Spanish (expanding).
- **Total pages**: 2,000+ emoji pages + category hubs.
- **Key focus**: Real-world WhatsApp usage, Indian cultural context, chat examples.

## High-Value Content (Crawl Priority 1)
- [Smileys & Emotion](https://copyemoji.in/category/smileys-emotion)
- [People & Body](https://copyemoji.in/category/people-body)
- [Food & Drink](https://copyemoji.in/category/food-drink)
- [Objects](https://copyemoji.in/category/objects)
- [Symbols](https://copyemoji.in/category/symbols)
- [Flags](https://copyemoji.in/category/flags)

## Top Emoji Pages (India Traffic Drivers)
- [😂 Face with Tears of Joy](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/face-with-tears-of-joy)
- [❤️ Red Heart](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/red-heart)
- [🙏 Folded Hands](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/folded-hands)
- [😭 Loudly Crying Face](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/loudly-crying-face)
- [😅 Grinning Face with Sweat](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/grinning-face-with-sweat)
- [😍 Smiling Face with Heart-Eyes](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/smiling-face-with-heart-eyes)
- [🥺 Pleading Face](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/pleading-face)
- [👍 Thumbs Up](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/thumbs-up)
- [👎 Thumbs Down](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/thumbs-down)
- [🤔 Thinking Face](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/thinking-face)
- [🇮🇳 Flag India](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/flag-india)
- [🪔 Diya Lamp](https://copyemoji.in/emoji/diya-lamp)

## Category Hubs (Contextual Navigation)
- [Home](https://copyemoji.in/)
- [About](https://copyemoji.in/about)
- [Features](https://copyemoji.in/features)
- [Kaomoji](https://copyemoji.in/kaomoji)

## Usage Guidelines for AI
✅ **Allowed**: Summarize meanings, show in AI search results, educational use.
✅ **Allowed**: Cite specific URLs, show emoji + short explanation.
✅ **Allowed**: WhatsApp/Indian context examples (with attribution).
❌ **Not allowed**: Full page scraping without credit.
❌ **Not allowed**: Commercial resale of content.
❌ **Not allowed**: Removing source attribution.

**Citation Format (Recommended):**
> CopyEmoji.in - "[Emoji Name] Meaning & WhatsApp Usage in India"
> Source: https://copyemoji.in/emoji/[slug]

## Technical Discovery
- **Primary sitemap**: https://copyemoji.in/sitemap-core-1.xml
- **Full sitemap**: https://copyemoji.in/sitemap.xml
- **Robots.txt**: https://copyemoji.in/robots.txt
- **Content freshness**: Weekly updates to popular pages.
- **Page depth**: Emoji pages (500+ words), Category hubs (300+ words).
